axes_orthogonality_note: K=3 ≥ 3 satisfied. design-strategy measures section topology + contribution enumeration + falsificationist-title presence (structural counts). falsifier-coverage measures per-contribution falsifier presence (binary per claim, tallied as ratio). scope-honesty measures DRAFT/peer-review disclosures + alignment with parent anima R44 observation cycle (textual disclosures vs evidence gap). Each axis uses a distinct observation method on a distinct sub-payload of the same artifact; pairwise correlation estimate <0.7 (raw 48 honored).
